title: SiteFlow Subscription and Refund Policy Explained
metaTitle: SiteFlow Subscription and Refund Policy Explained
metaDescription: SiteFlow subscription fees are non-refundable. Learn about cancellation, auto-renewal, rate changes, tax responsibilities, and when SiteFlow may issue a refund at its discretion.
author: SiteFlow Operations Team
body:
SiteFlow subscription fees are non-refundable. If you cancel a prepaid monthly or annual plan, you will not receive a refund for the unused portion of your subscription period.

Refund Policy

Fees are non-refundable except as required by law or at SiteFlow’s sole discretion.

Auto-Renewal

All SiteFlow accounts are set to auto-renew by default. SiteFlow may automatically charge you on or after your renewal date unless you cancel the service before the renewal date.

To avoid being charged for the next period, cancel your subscription before the renewal date by contacting the support team in your company WhatsApp group.

Rate Changes

SiteFlow may revise subscription fee rates from time to time. You will be informed before any revised amount is charged.

Payment and Taxes

  • You are responsible for paying all applicable fees when due
  • You are responsible for all taxes, excluding taxes on SiteFlow’s net income
  • SiteFlow will charge tax where required by law
  • Accounts with past-due fees may be suspended or terminated

If Something Goes Wrong
